strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development across various technologies
Strong background in AI and cloud-related projects
Demonstrated leadership and innovation in software development
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and implementation at a director level
Limited experience with cloud technologies at scale
No clear evidence of advising customers on cutting-edge technologies
response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background and experience in AI-related projects, but lacks director-level experience and direct experience in AI strategy.
